description: A match_summary inside a GET /contexts/search response whose optional 'domain' field is JSON null. match_summary types 'domain' as a bare string ("type": "string" in acdp-common.schema.json#/$defs/match_summary), NOT as "type": ["string", "null"]. An absent domain MUST be omitted, never serialized as null (RFC-ACDP-0005 §2.2.1). A strict receiver MUST reject 'domain: null' as schema_violation.

expected.rationale: domain is an optional, non-nullable string. A context with no domain MUST be serialized with the domain key omitted, not with domain set to null. The same absent-vs-null rule applies uniformly to every optional bare-string field in every ACDP wire type.
